nasb.text: In Hades he lifted up his eyes, being in torment, and *saw Abraham far away and Lazarus in his bosom.

esv.text: and in Hades, being in torment, he lifted up his eyes and saw Abraham far off and Lazarus at his side.

cnv.text: 財主在陰間受痛苦，舉目遠遠望見亞伯拉罕，和他懷裡的拉撒路，

ccb.text: 他在阴间受折磨，抬头远远地看见亚伯拉罕和他身边的拉撒路，

csbs.text: 财主在阴间的痛苦中，举目远远地望见亚伯拉罕，又望见拉撒路在他怀里，
